steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that guard cells regulate carbon dioxide intake, then notes they also regulate water loss, showing an added function.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Additionally signals that the second clause adds another idea, matching the second function of guard cells.
The other three either show contrast, sequence, or conclusion, which do not fit the additive relationship.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
